caption: The video features an individual standing at a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and is wearing glasses. They are gesturing with their right hand while speaking into two microphones placed on the podium. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative element to the right side of the frame, which includes a tall, slender structure with red flowers at its base. The setting appears formal, likely a significant event or ceremony. The speaker's demeanor suggests they are addressing an important topic, engaging the audience with both their words and gestures.
